## Installation

You can download the released `zip` file and extract it to the `mpv/scripts` directory or run `make install`. See [Installation](https://github.com/WeilinChen1221/mpvoracious#installation) for details.

## Issues

If you face problems when installing or using mpvoracious, open an issue on this repository with your mpv version, OS, config, and relevant mpv log output.
